name: Emberimp
description: A flicker of leftover campfire that learned mischief before manners. Warms laps; sings homework.
babyDescription: A single warm spark that hums when happy and pops when startled.
teenDescription: Now hot enough to toast a marshmallow, and absolutely willing to do it without asking.
adultDescription: A proud little flame spirit. Its horns glow brighter the funnier it thinks it's being.
